sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n65207" key="mataiologi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μᾰταιο-λογία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n65207.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">idle talk</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1322.tlg001:2:16" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Diogenian.Epicur.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.16</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0031.tlg015.perseus-grc1:1:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">1 Ep.Ti.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.6</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.6f</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:150:24" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">150.24</biblScope> </bibl> (pl.), al., <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2034.tlg003:4:16" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Porph.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Abst.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.16</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
